meta.source: Bundesbank BBSIS daily zero-coupon close 2024-01-02 (Sprint 2 spec §7 row 2)
meta.note: 10 Bund tenors. Cross-val target: Bundesbank Svensson published <5 bps (golden-fit values used as published proxy in absence of live cross-val fetch).

tolerance.note_rmse: rmse_bps_max=10 covers the Svensson residual on a 10-tenor Bund curve; HIGH_RMSE flag triggers >15 bps (Tier 1 per spec §6). The spec §7 row 2 ±5 bps target applies to per-tenor cross-val (Bundesbank Svensson published), not optimiser residual.
